channel.title: feedmail Test (RSS)
channel.description: Test RSS feed for local development

item.title: RSS Test Post: Working with images and links
item.description:
This is a test post from the RSS feed fixture. It contains various HTML elements to verify email rendering.

Here is a link to the site and some bold text with italics.

The image above should be constrained to the email width by the constrainImages function. This paragraph comes after the image to verify spacing.

item.title: RSS Test Post: Plain text fallback
item.description:
A shorter post to test the plain text conversion. It has a list:

  • First item in the list
  • Second item with a link
  • Third item

And a closing paragraph.
